name: Love's Travel Stop #175 (Topeka Service Area)
description: Love's-operated Kansas Turnpike Topeka Service Area on I-70 at Mile 188 with roughly 100 truck parking spaces, diesel fuel, showers and food, open 24 hours.

name: Love's Travel Stop #173 (Lawrence Service Area)
description: Love's-operated Kansas Turnpike Lawrence Service Area on I-70 at Mile 209 (Tonganoxie area) with about 100 truck parking spaces, diesel, showers and food, open 24 hours.

name: Love's Travel Stop #732 (Abilene)
description: Full-service Love's at I-70 Exit 272 with about 74 truck spaces, diesel, showers, laundry, truck tire care and a CAT scale, open 24 hours.

name: Sapp Bros. Travel Center - Junction City
description: Independent Sapp Bros. travel center at I-70 Exit 295 (US-77) offering 24-hour diesel, showers, laundry, certified scales, truck repair and a truck wash.

name: Sapp Bros. Truck Wash - Junction City
description: Truck wash service at the Sapp Bros. travel center off I-70 Exit 295 in Junction City.

name: Shell Travel Center - Junction City
description: Independent Shell travel center at I-70 Exit 298 in Junction City with 24-hour diesel, showers, laundry, a trucker's lounge and scales.

name: CAT Scale at Love's Travel Stop #769 (Topeka)
description: Certified CAT scale at the Love's near the I-70/US-75 interchange in north Topeka, with diesel, showers and food.

name: Wabaunsee County Weigh Station (Eastbound)
description: Kansas Highway Patrol weigh/inspection station on I-70 eastbound about a mile west of McFarland, between Topeka and Junction City.
